payload.answer: I can help rewrite an existing memory, but “He prefers the other one” is ambiguous. Please choose which memory/person/item this should replace or clarify the wording.
repair_options: Rewrite the selected existing memory to: “He prefers the other one.”
Clarify who “he” refers to and what “the other one” means before rewriting.
Cancel the rewrite and leave existing memories unchanged.
